how to do organic ugc with seedance 2.0:

- generate a nanobanana character image 
- use the format shown in the video
- go to capcut on vpn or zenysai ugc generator
- enter your prompt, select 2.0 pro, 15 seconds
- add auto captions on tiktok
- post at least 3 times a day https://t.co/UwALxFp2nR

Prompt like a creator (not cinematic bs)
Think in ad flow: hook → demo → lifestyle → CTA
